title: Peppery Gooey Malaysian Semolina Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and plant-based Malaysian semolina dish that's perfect for a mealtime treat with its peppery kick and gooey texture.

ingredients.name: Red Chillies
ingredients.notes: remove seeds and membranes if using fresh chillies

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring semolina to boil with vegetable broth and water.
Reduce heat to low, stir occasionally until the mixture thickens slightly. Simmer for about 5-7 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
Add tomato paste, finely chopped green onions, red chillies, minced garlic, soy sauce, Maggi seasoning (or salt), pepper powder, and nutritional yeast if using. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Simmer the mixture for an additional 2-3 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Turn off heat immediately after it simmers down, serving immediately as a gooey and peppery semolina dish.
